strings.feedback.title: Help & feedback
strings.feedback.subtitle: Found a bug, want a feature, or just have a thought? Send it our way.
strings.feedback.type.label: Type
strings.feedback.message.label: Message
strings.feedback.message.placeholder: Tell us what happened or what you have in mind.
strings.feedback.diagnostics.label: Included with your report
strings.published.empty.title: Nothing published yet
strings.published.empty.body: Once posts go live they appear here with links to the platforms.
strings.clientSwitcher.heading: Projects
strings.clientSwitcher.defaultTip: The initial workspace pendpost created at first run. Hidden now that you have a project - switch to it any time.
strings.clientBand.label: Active project
strings.activity.checkNow.confirm.title: Publish due posts for {client}?
strings.activity.checkNow.confirm.body: This publishes any approved posts that are due for {client} right now. There is no undo.
strings.activity.checkNow.confirm.bodyNoClient: This publishes any approved posts that are due right now. There is no undo.
strings.clients.title: Projects (local workspaces)
strings.clients.subtitle: Local project administration. No login, no billing - each project is an isolated workspace on this machine.
strings.clients.empty.title: No projects
strings.clients.empty.body: Create your first project to get started.
strings.clients.health.blockedTitle: Meta action block (368) recorded - publishing is paused until the owner clears it
strings.clients.confirm.archiveBody: {name} will be hidden from the picker and skipped by the scheduler. Its data is retained and it stays reachable by id.
strings.clients.confirm.restoreBody: {name} will return to the active picker and be swept by the scheduler again.
strings.clientForm.hint.slugNew: Lowercase letters, digits, hyphens. Permanent once created.
strings.clientForm.hint.slugEdit: The id is the on-disk workspace name and cannot change.
strings.clientForm.hint.logo: Pick a PNG or JPG. It uploads to this project's media and serves via /media. Leave blank for a monogram.
strings.clientForm.error.slugFormat: Use lowercase letters, digits and hyphens; must start with a letter or digit.
strings.clientForm.error.slugExists: A project with this id already exists.
strings.clientForm.error.logoNotImage: Pick a PNG or JPG image for the logo.
strings.keys.title: Keys - {name}
strings.keys.subtitle: Local; secrets are never displayed. A refresh touches only {name}'s credentials.
strings.keys.empty.title: No credentials configured for {name}
strings.keys.empty.body: Add this project's keys via the engine CLI - pendpost never writes full secrets.
strings.keys.section.heading: Credentials (presence / last 4 only)
strings.keys.footer: Rotate other secrets via the engine CLI. pendpost shows presence / tail / expiry only and never stores or displays full secrets.
strings.composer.field.caption: Caption
strings.composer.field.title: Title (YouTube / LinkedIn)
strings.approvals.lint.advisoryLabel: Advisory: caption has {count} brand-rule errors a target platform would block at publish. Approval is not affected.
strings.composer.discard.title: Discard unsaved changes?
strings.composer.discard.body: Your changes to this draft will be lost.
strings.composer.error.idFormat: The post ID must match the format a-z, 0-9, - or _ (e.g. r12).
strings.composer.error.staleWrite: The post was changed in the meantime (e.g. by a publish engine). Close, reopen and edit again.
strings.composer.stranded.title: Drop the interactive stickers?
strings.composer.stranded.body: This draft has interactive stickers that only apply to an Instagram story. Changing the format or removing Instagram will drop them.
strings.composer.interactive.heading: Interactive (Instagram story)
strings.composer.interactive.noStickers: No stickers yet. Stickers are previewed here and (except mentions) added manually in Instagram.
strings.composer.sticker.poll.label: Poll
strings.composer.sticker.question.label: Question

strings.composer.sticker.mention.label: Mention
strings.composer.sticker.location.label: Location
strings.composer.sticker.hashtag.label: Hashtag
strings.composer.sticker.music.label: Music
strings.composer.sticker.poll.question: Poll question
strings.composer.sticker.location.name: Location name
strings.composer.sticker.music.title: Music title
strings.composer.sticker.api.previewHint: Preview-only on the API - add this sticker by hand in the Instagram app
strings.assets.header.title: Library
strings.assets.drop.suffix: - the file then appears in the library.
strings.assets.error.loadFailed: Folder data/media not found or server unreachable.
strings.assets.empty.title: No matching files
strings.assets.empty.hint: Adjust the search or filters, or upload a new file.
strings.assets.firstRun.title: No media yet
strings.assets.firstRun.body: Build your campaign even before adding media. Drag a video here or use Upload to add your first file.
strings.assets.spec.res.other: Unusual aspect ratio - check whether it fits the platform
strings.assets.spec.codecBad: Not H.264 - not playable on some platforms
strings.assets.spec.faststartBad: Not web-optimized: starts with a delay when streaming
strings.assets.delete.title: Delete {file}?
strings.assets.delete.body: This permanently removes the file (and its cover) from data/media. This cannot be undone.
strings.assets.delete.bodyInUse: {file} is still used by {count} post(s): {posts}. Deleting it leaves those posts pointing at a missing render. Delete anyway?
strings.assets.rename.title: Rename {file}
strings.assets.rename.body: Enter a new filename (keep the same extension). The cover sibling is renamed too.
strings.assets.rename.bodyInUse: {file} is still used by {count} post(s): {posts}. Renaming it breaks those posts' media reference. Rename anyway?
strings.assets.mutate.errorGeneric: That action could not be completed.
strings.assets.mutate.errorExists: A file with that name already exists.
strings.assets.spec.type.image: Image - a still, shown as a picture
strings.assets.filter.usage: Filter by usage and aspect ratio
strings.assets.sort.label: Sort
strings.approvals.rejectPrompt.title: Reject post
strings.approvals.keys.hint: Press a to approve, r to reject the focused post.
strings.approvals.keys.title: Keyboard shortcuts
strings.approvals.density.label: Density
strings.approvals.view.label: View
strings.approvals.empty.pendingBody: All posts are approved or already published.
strings.approvals.empty.allBody: Adjust the filters or create a post with "New".
strings.approvals.bulkRejectPrompt.title: Reject selected posts
strings.blockers.title: Won't publish yet
strings.blockers.media.resolution: Resolution isn't a standard size ({resolution}) - it may be re-encoded or cropped
strings.blockers.media.codec: Codec may not be supported - re-encode to H.264 / yuv420p
strings.blockers.media.faststart: Not faststart-optimized - playback may stall while uploading
strings.activity.error.title: Activity could not be loaded
strings.activity.error.body: The history could not be fetched. Check that the app is running and try again.
strings.activity.empty.title: No activity yet
strings.activity.empty.body: Every publish attempt by the scheduler and the engines appears here - including errors and Meta blocks.
strings.activity.filter.note: Platform-agnostic events (campaigns, scheduler, token) always stay visible.
strings.insights.schedulerNote: The scheduler fetches automatically every day while it is running.
strings.insights.error.title: Metrics could not be loaded
strings.insights.empty.title: No metrics yet
strings.insights.empty.body: Metrics appear once posts are published - then use "Fetch metrics" above.
strings.insights.totals.label: Per-platform totals
strings.settings.title: Settings
strings.settings.subtitle: Display and scheduling preferences. Account details and connections live in Setup.
strings.readiness.title: Readiness
strings.readiness.readySub: No blockers - approved posts publish on schedule.
strings.readiness.scheduler.explain: Starts the background scheduler. It checks every 60 seconds and publishes only posts you have already approved - clicking this never publishes anything now.
strings.readiness.scheduler.waiting: Resolve the steps above first, then start the scheduler.
strings.blocker.lane.failed: {label}: connection failed - renew the token: {cmd}. Open Setup.
strings.blocker.lane.blocked: {label}: action block active - clear it in Meta Business Suite. Open Setup.
strings.blocker.schedulerOff: Scheduler is off - due posts won't publish (activation order applies).
strings.firstRun.title: Welcome to pendpost
strings.settings.lane.paused: The Meta publishing lane is paused - approved Meta posts are not sent out.
strings.settings.lane.active: The Meta publishing lane is active.
strings.settings.lane.saveCadence.aria: Save the Meta lane cadence cap
strings.settings.lane.pausePrompt.title: Pause the Meta lane
strings.settings.lane.pausePrompt.body: Approved Meta posts will not be sent until you resume. Add an optional reason for the activity log.
strings.settings.lane.envOverride: The environment variable META_PUBLISHING_PAUSED is set and overrides this file - pause/resume here has no effect until it is unset.
strings.setup.idField.metaPageId.label: Meta Page ID
strings.setup.idField.metaPageId.tip: Numeric ID of the Facebook page.
strings.setup.idField.metaIgUserId.label: Instagram User ID
strings.setup.idField.metaIgUserId.tip: Numeric ID of the linked Instagram account.
strings.setup.idField.metaAppId.label: Meta App ID
strings.setup.idField.metaAppId.tip: Numeric ID of the Meta app.
strings.setup.idField.linkedinOrgUrn.label: LinkedIn Organisation URN
strings.setup.idField.linkedinOrgUrn.tip: URN of the LinkedIn company page (urn:li:organization:<digits>).
strings.setup.idField.linkedinApiVersion.label: LinkedIn API version
strings.setup.idField.linkedinApiVersion.tip: Version month of the LinkedIn API in the format YYYYMM.
strings.setup.idField.ytRedirectUri.label: YouTube Redirect URI
strings.setup.idField.ytRedirectUri.tip: Absolute http(s) redirect URI of the YouTube OAuth client.
strings.settings.time.label: Time format
strings.settings.cardAccent.label: Planner card accent
strings.settings.staleWrite.message: The settings were changed in the meantime (e.g. by a rotation via the command line). Reload and save again.
strings.planner.empty.periodBody: Check the filters above (platform, type, status, campaign) or create a post with "New".
strings.planner.empty.title: No posts
strings.planner.empty.body: Adjust the filters or create a post with "New".
strings.planner.runNow.confirm.title: Publish due posts now?
strings.planner.runNow.confirm.body: This publishes the approved, due posts for {client} to their real platforms right now ({count} ready). There is no undo.
strings.planner.runNow.confirm.label: Publish now
strings.planner.runNow.tip.run: Publishes the approved, due posts for {client} now ({count} ready). No undo.
strings.planner.runNow.inFlight: A publish run is already in progress.
strings.planner.runNow.blockedAria: Meta lane is blocked - running is disabled; check readiness instead.
strings.planner.runNow.needsConfirm.title: Confirm publish run
strings.planner.runNow.needsConfirm.body: The server needs an explicit confirmation to run the publish. Continue?
strings.planner.runNow.needsConfirm.label: Continue
strings.planner.runDialog.title: Run due posts
strings.planner.runDialog.subtitle: Review the posts due for {client} now and pick which to publish ({count} due). There is no undo.
strings.planner.runDialog.subtitleNoClient: Review the posts due now and pick which to publish ({count} due). There is no undo.
strings.planner.runDialog.empty.title: Nothing due right now
strings.planner.runDialog.empty.body: No approved post has reached its scheduled time yet. They will appear here when due.
strings.postDetail.metaPaused.notice: Meta lane is paused - posts will not be published.
strings.postDetail.action.markTip: Posted externally - remove from the queue
strings.postDetail.action.verifyTip: Check whether this post is actually live (read-only)
strings.postDetail.confirm.title: Please confirm
strings.postDetail.reject.title: Reject post
strings.postDetail.reject.body: What should change on the post? (optional)
strings.postDetail.delete.title: Delete post
strings.postDetail.delete.body: Really delete post {id} from the plan?
strings.postDetail.delete.forceBody:
{message}

Delete anyway? Everything stays in place on the platforms.
strings.postDetail.markPosted.title: Mark as posted
strings.postDetail.markPosted.body: Mark post {id} as posted externally? It leaves the publishing queue - NOTHING is published. Optionally paste the link to the live post.
strings.postDetail.publishNow.title: Publish now?
strings.postDetail.publishNow.body: Post {id} will be published to the connected platforms immediately. This cannot be undone.
strings.postDetail.publishNow.laneFailed: Publish failed ({lane}). See Activity for details.
strings.postDetail.publishNow.nothingRan: Nothing published - the post was not due or already posted.
strings.postDetail.reschedule.pastDate: The schedule must be in the future.
strings.postDetail.section.caption: Caption
strings.postDetail.platform.nativeWarn: Scheduled natively - changes delete the video
strings.postDetail.delivery.native: Publishes even if your computer is off
strings.postDetail.cover.hint: Scrub the video to the desired spot and apply it - or drag an image here.
strings.postDetail.cover.missing: Cover file missing locally - it must be present again before publishing
strings.postDetail.cover.chip.x: X: no custom cover - first frame
strings.postDetail.file.missing: File not present locally - it must be present again before publishing
strings.composer.field.xCaptionPlaceholder: Custom X text (max 280 characters). Leave empty to use the caption above - but only if it is under 280 characters.
strings.setup.idField.xHandle.label: X handle
strings.setup.idField.xHandle.tip: X @handle (without @) for permalinks and the account link.
strings.setup.idField.xRedirectUri.label: X redirect URI
strings.setup.idField.xRedirectUri.tip: Callback URI of the X OAuth 2.0 client (default http://localhost:8087/callback).
strings.setup.title: Setup
strings.setup.subtitle: Connect each platform, or skip the ones you are not using. Enter your secrets here or mint them in your terminal - either way they stay on your machine.
strings.setup.aiPrompt.label: Copy AI prompt
strings.setup.aiPrompt.fallbackHint: Copy this and paste it into Claude for Chrome.
strings.setup.connectedNote: This platform is connected and ready to publish.
strings.setup.skippedNote: Skipped - this platform is left out on purpose and never counts as incomplete.
strings.setup.disconnect.confirmBody: This clears all stored credentials for {label}. You'll need to re-authorize to post to it again.
strings.setup.disconnect.error: Could not disconnect - please try again.
strings.setup.field.fallbackHint: Used only when no channel ID is set.
strings.setup.field.autoHint: Filled in automatically when you connect.
strings.connect.browserHint: Finish the sign-in in the browser window that just opened.
strings.connect.youtubeUnverified: Google will show a "Google hasn't verified this app" notice. That's expected - it's your own app. Click Advanced, then continue to pendpost.
strings.connect.localNote: Stays on this machine - written to your local .env, never sent anywhere.
strings.connect.timeout: Still not connected. Open the sign-in page and finish, then check again - or use your terminal below.
strings.setup.writeError: Could not save - reload and try again.
strings.state.tip.scheduled-native: Handed to the platform. It publishes on time even if your computer is off.
strings.state.tip.waiting-due: Scheduled in pendpost. It needs pendpost running at the scheduled time to publish.
strings.state.tip.overdue: Past its time and not published. pendpost was not running; start it to publish.
strings.statusLegend.title: What the time-chip colours mean
strings.status.tip.scheduled: Scheduled. Open the post to see which platforms publish even if your computer is off.
strings.sidebar.markMetaCleared: Mark Meta action block as cleared
strings.app.view.label: View
strings.app.campaign.label: Campaign
strings.app.filter.label: Filter
strings.app.gone.title: Post no longer in the plan
strings.app.gone.body: It was deleted or the campaign is no longer readable.
strings.palette.label: Command palette
strings.ui.linkCard.title: LinkedIn card preview
strings.ui.linkCard.noImage: No preview image - the card shows no image
strings.ui.player.label: Video player
strings.ui.story.stickerHint: preview - add stickers manually in Instagram
strings.sidebar.scheduler.startHelp: Start the background scheduler - it publishes approved, due posts on a 60s cycle and never publishes on this click.
strings.sidebar.delivery.title: Delivery
strings.connection.title: Stay online around the clock
strings.connection.status.cloud: Publishing around the clock through the cloud
strings.connection.fact: Facebook and YouTube publish on their own, even when your computer is off. Instagram, LinkedIn and X publish only while pendpost is open.
strings.connection.pitch: Rather not keep your computer running? The 24/7 cloud service keeps Instagram, LinkedIn and X publishing around the clock, and you can move back to self-hosting any time.
strings.connection.price.cloud: 24/7 cloud service: plans include a pooled monthly post allowance, then a per-post overage at your plan rate; extra always-on brands are a small monthly add-on. A post counts once, even when it publishes to several platforms.
strings.connection.needsPayment: add a card to keep firing
strings.explainer.delivery.title: Keep publishing, even when your computer is off
strings.explainer.delivery.body: pendpost is 100% open source and free. You can run it yourself, but your computer has to be on for your posts to go out. If you'd rather not keep your computer running, we offer a 24/7 cloud service.
strings.sidebar.copyCommandBody: Run this command in the terminal:
strings.sidebar.clearBlock.title: Clear action block?
strings.sidebar.clearBlock.body: Confirmed in the Meta Business Suite that the action block is lifted? Only then mark it as cleared here - the scheduler will resume the Meta lane afterwards.
strings.sidebar.block.likelyLifted: Block likely lifted - please confirm in the Meta Business Suite, then mark it as cleared here
strings.sidebar.block.reported: Action block reported {date} - clear manually once Meta lifts it
strings.ui.story.sticker.question: Ask me anything
strings.ui.confirm.title: Confirm
strings.reschedule.confirm.body: This post is natively scheduled. Rescheduling deletes the scheduled object on the platform and recreates it.
strings.reschedule.failed.title: Reschedule failed
strings.reschedule.failed.body: The post could not be rescheduled.
strings.clientForm.error.accentInvalid: Enter a valid hex color, e.g. #0f766e.
strings.clientForm.error.accentContrast: Contrast too low ({onLight}:1 on light, {onDark}:1 on dark). An accent must reach AA (>= 4.5:1) against the light or dark surface.
strings.firstRun.idHint: Use lowercase letters, numbers and dashes only, for example spring-launch
strings.published.empty.rangeBody: Posts exist outside this window. Widen the range to see them.
strings.activity.empty.filteredBody: Adjust or clear the filters above.
strings.clientSwitcher.switchFailed: Could not switch to {name}. You are still on the previous project.
strings.clients.announce.activated: {name} is now the active project. Every page now shows {name}.
strings.keys.expiry.durableMinted: durable refresh token, minted on demand
strings.keys.refresh.alert.title: Refresh failed.
strings.clientForm.error.timezoneInvalid: Not a valid timezone. Use an IANA name like Europe/Zurich.
strings.composer.lint.truncated: Only the first 200 issues are shown.
strings.insights.fetch.freshLabel: Fetch metrics (data is fresh from today)
strings.settings.tz.label: Time zone
strings.settings.tz.tip: The time zone used when scheduling and displaying post times.
strings.settings.time.tip: Show times in 24-hour or 12-hour format. Auto follows your language.
strings.settings.cardAccent.tip: How planner cards mark items that still need action.
strings.setup.idField.igHandle.label: Instagram handle
strings.setup.idField.igHandle.tip: Public Instagram handle (without @). Builds the View on Instagram link on Published.
strings.setup.idField.ytChannelId.label: YouTube channel ID
strings.setup.idField.ytChannelId.tip: YouTube channel ID (starts with UC). Builds the View on YouTube link on Published.
strings.setup.idField.ytHandle.label: YouTube handle
strings.setup.idField.ytHandle.tip: YouTube @handle, used for the channel link when no channel ID is set.
strings.settings.language.label: Language
strings.settings.language.tip: The language for the dashboard and the digest. English is the safe baseline.
strings.firstRun.body: Create your first campaign, then draft, get approval, schedule, and publish - all from here.
strings.cloud.title: 24/7 cloud service
strings.cloud.subtitle: An optional 24/7 cloud service that fires your live lanes around the clock, even when your machine is off. The free self-host core stays the whole product. This service sits on top of it and is never a paywall.
strings.cloud.off.title: 24/7 cloud service is off
strings.cloud.off.body: pendpost runs the live lanes from your own machine for free. Connect the 24/7 cloud service only if you want pendpost to keep publishing approved posts while your machine is off. You can eject back to self-host at any time.
strings.cloud.unfinished.title: Finish connecting
strings.cloud.unfinished.body: Your workspace is connected, but its access key is missing, so the cloud can't publish anything yet. Reconnect to finish: you sign in once in your browser, nothing is typed here.
strings.cloud.on.title: 24/7 cloud service is connected
strings.cloud.account.billingNotYet: Opens once a plan is active
strings.cloud.account.switchHint: Keeps your platform logins; sign back in any time
strings.cloud.account.ejectHint: Disconnect the cloud and publish locally again
strings.cloud.account.signOut.confirm.title: Sign out of the cloud?
strings.cloud.account.signOut.confirm.body: This signs you out and removes the local access key, so the cloud stops publishing for now. Your platform logins stay on this computer, and you can sign back in any time. To fully return to self-host instead, use Eject.
strings.cloud.signIn.title: Sign in or create your cloud account
strings.cloud.signIn.body: The cloud is a separate account from this app. Sign in once in your browser to connect it — nothing is typed here.
strings.cloud.signIn.createHint: No account yet? The same sign-in creates one. It also turns on 24/7 so the cloud starts publishing your approved posts.
strings.cloud.eject.confirm.title: Eject to self-host?
strings.cloud.eject.confirm.body: This disconnects the cloud, removes the local access key, and hands publishing back to this computer. You will get a checklist of platforms to reconnect locally. This is heavier than signing out — use Sign out if you only want to switch accounts.
strings.cloud.connect.title: Connect a workspace
strings.cloud.enable.waiting: Waiting for you to finish signing up - do it in your browser, then come back here.
strings.cloud.enable.timeout: Sign-up did not finish. Close the browser tab and try again.
strings.cloud.clients.title: Cloud projects
strings.cloud.clients.body: Each project is a brand in one cloud account. You pay once, not per project. Turn 24/7 on per project; the cloud fires only the ones you switch on. Your plan includes a set number of always-on brands; each extra always-on brand is a small monthly add-on.
strings.cloud.clients.cloudCaption: around the clock · local publishing paused
strings.cloud.clients.confirm.onBody: The cloud publishes this brand's approved posts around the clock, even when your computer is off. Local publishing pauses for this brand so nothing posts twice.
strings.cloud.clients.confirm.onBodyPaid: The cloud publishes this brand's approved posts around the clock, even when your computer is off. Local publishing pauses for this brand so nothing posts twice. Each extra always-on brand costs {rate} per month.
strings.cloud.clients.confirm.offBody: Your computer takes over publishing this brand again — it must be running for posts to go out. The cloud stops firing this brand.
strings.cloud.clients.needPlan.title: Start your plan first
strings.cloud.clients.needPlan.body: Running a brand around the clock needs an active plan. Choose your plan just below; your first always-on brand is included.
strings.cloud.billing.title: Plan & billing
strings.cloud.meter.title: This month
strings.cloud.deepLink.picked: You picked {tier} — sign in to start it.
strings.cloud.cap.title: Spend cap
strings.cloud.cap.prompt: Cap the most you want to spend on overage this period, in dollars.
strings.cloud.cap.near: You are close to your spend cap.
strings.cloud.cap.reached: Spend cap reached. Extra posts pause until you raise the cap or the period resets.
strings.cloud.brands.extraCost: Extra always-on brands beyond your plan cost {amount} a month each.
strings.cloud.trial.hardstop.title: Your free trial is used up
strings.cloud.trial.hardstop.body: You have used all your trial posts. Choose a plan to keep the cloud publishing.
strings.cloud.billingPortal.tip: Opens the Stripe billing portal to manage your plan, payment method, invoices, and cancellation.
strings.cloud.meter.status.trialing: On the free trial - once your trial posts are used, choose a plan to keep firing.
strings.cloud.meter.status.active: Active - posts above the allowance are billed per post.
strings.cloud.meter.status.past_due: Payment past due - firing continues through the grace period.
strings.cloud.checkout.prompt: You have used your free trial posts. Add a card to keep the cloud firing.
strings.cloud.field.baseUrl.label: Base URL
strings.cloud.field.workspaceId.label: Workspace id
strings.cloud.field.apiKey.label: Api key
strings.cloud.eject.tip: Disconnects the cloud, removes the local access key, and shows which platforms to reconnect locally. After this you publish from your machine again.
strings.cloud.eject.done: Switched back to self-host - you publish locally again.
strings.cloud.eject.reauthLead: Reconnect these platforms locally so you can publish them yourself:
strings.cloud.action.error: The action could not be completed.
strings.cloud.localPaused.title: Local publishing is paused for this workspace
strings.cloud.localPaused.body: The 24/7 cloud service now fires your live lanes, so your machine no longer publishes them. This avoids any double-post. To resume local firing, switch the project off or eject to self-host.
strings.cloud.resync.tip: Re-seals your platform tokens and re-sends every approved post to the cloud. This happens automatically on connect - use it only to catch up.
strings.cloud.sync.tip: Pulls the cloud's published results back into your local plans, so posts the cloud already fired stop showing as overdue. Runs automatically in the background - use it to catch up now.
strings.cloud.clients.onTip: The cloud fires this project's due posts even while your machine is off. Tap to pause back to self-host.
strings.cloud.clients.offTip: This project publishes locally from your machine. Tap to switch 24/7 on.
strings.cloud.checkout.tip: Opens the secure checkout so the cloud keeps publishing past the free allowance.
strings.approvals.card.autoApprovedLabel: Approved automatically by your auto-approve policy, a setting only you can enable.
strings.settings.automation.title: Automation
strings.settings.automation.subtitle: Progressive autonomy. Off by default: you approve every post. Turn it up as you build trust.
strings.settings.automation.toggle.label: Auto-approve agent drafts
strings.settings.automation.toggle.tip: When on, new agent-drafted posts that match the scope below are approved automatically, and your schedule publishes them. You can turn this off any time.
strings.settings.automation.platforms.label: Platforms to auto-approve
strings.settings.automation.platforms.hint: A post is auto-approved only if every platform it targets is selected. Select none to trust all platforms.
strings.settings.automation.lintClean.label: Require a clean brand-lint
strings.settings.automation.lintClean.tip: Skip auto-approval for any caption with a brand-lint error, so it stays a draft for you to fix.
strings.settings.automation.note: Auto-approve is a policy only you can enable. Posts still pass brand-lint, anti-ban breakers, and your schedule before publishing, and you can turn it off any time.
strings.settings.platforms.title: Publishing platforms
strings.settings.platforms.subtitle: Which platforms pendpost may publish to. A platform turned off never publishes, locally or from the 24/7 cloud service.
strings.settings.platforms.note: Facebook is off by default. Turn a platform on only once you have connected its account in Setup.
strings.cloud.plans.heading: Choose a plan
strings.cloud.summary.title: Review {plan}
strings.cloud.summary.note: Secure checkout opens in your browser. You can change or cancel your plan any time.
strings.cloud.checkout.openingBody: We opened Stripe in your browser to finish your purchase. Come back here once you are done.
strings.cloud.return.activeBody: Your subscription is active. The cloud keeps publishing your always-on brands around the clock.
strings.cloud.return.incompleteBody: No plan was started and you were not charged. Pick a plan below whenever you are ready.
